caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown wooden lectern, delivering a speech in a room featuring a textured green stone wall. He is wearing a white Nehru jacket over a light-colored long-sleeved shirt. Two thin microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. To his right, a decorative architectural column with gold-colored accents and a small cluster of red flowers is visible. Throughout the sequence, he remains standing in the same position, glancing slightly to his left and then back toward the center. His facial expression remains serious as he speaks, with his hands resting on the lectern. The background and the surrounding environment remain static, with no other people, on-screen text, or logos visible. The only movement is the subtle shift in his gaze and head position as he addresses his audience.
